content: I thought so too, but looking closer it's William
Male Keeper doesn't have the same hair (more visible in higher quality), and the right eye is intentionally obscured

just like William's right eye in the game, it *never* appears
except for his younger self
Given what we learn in chapter 2 of arc II, you might be onto something
Here's a better quality version of the cg
it's definitely William

About the key, William's profile mention he carries one all the time, and that a "friend" of his died. This key supposedly belonged to that friend
||It's a weird coincidence that this William (who might be a bit younger? unless it's just the artstyle) still has both his arms at the moment he is looking at this scene, with a corpse hanging just like his, and a key breaking...||
The scene still appears in this pv, that was out around launch in HK https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CGHXSPDO2zQ

embeds.title: 《忘卻前夜》| 喚醒禁忌存在，對抗未知災厄－歡...
embeds.description:
當「融蝕」悄然降臨，當世界無聲死去──而人們對此一無所知。
喚醒與災厄同源的禁忌力量，連結遊走在瘋狂邊緣的人形武器，
來抵抗這場隱密而浩大的危機。
迷霧之下，你會是一切的轉折，還是──
◆◆◆◆◆◆
禁忌卡牌構築手遊《忘卻前夜》事前預約已...

content: actually a lot of stuff from the concept pv also appear in this one (dec 2023) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Nw8EG5sAZUo

embeds.title: 《忘卻前夜》實機玩法丨迷霧重重 步步燒腦！
embeds.description:
《忘卻前夜》Roguelite實機玩法！
撥開迷霧探索肉鴿地圖，隨機事件構築專屬卡組，
守密人將會如何抉擇——
在怪談的正中心，在災厄的起源地
在整座城市最黑暗、最瘋狂、最不可接近的場所
人們總會看到你的身影
——這便是彌薩格守密人的覺悟與使命
